name: SI
title: HL7 v2 SI Data Type
description: A non-negative integer in the range of 0 to 9999. The SI (Sequence ID) data type is used to number repetitions of a segment or field within a message. The first repetition is numbered 1, the second 2, and so on. A value of 0 is used in certain fields to indicate that this segment is not included in the set.

element.definition: A non-negative integer in the range of 0 to 9999, used to number repetitions of a segment or field within a message. The first repetition is numbered 1, the second 2, and so on. A value of 0 may indicate that the segment is not included in the set.
